 cd downloads
 ssh -i "fs-key.pem" ubuntu@ec2-34-207-117-122.compute-1.amazonaws.com

~$ ping 54.172.154.152

 nano file.txt

 scp -i "fs-key.pem" fs-key.pem ubuntu@:/home/ubuntu/
~$ exit

scp -i "fs-key.pem" fs-key.pem ubuntu@34.207.117.122:/home/ubuntu/

 ssh -i "fs-key.pem" ubuntu@ec2-34-207-117-122.compute-1.amazonaws.com

ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-251:~$ ls
file.txt  fs-key.pem

~$ scp -i "fs-key.pem" file.txt ubuntu@54.172.154.152:/home/ubuntu/
This private key will be ignored.
Load key "fs-key.pem": bad permissions
ubuntu@54.172.154.152: Permission denied (publickey).
scp: Connection closed

$ chmod 400 "fs-key.pem"

ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-251:~$ scp -i "fs-key.pem" file.txt ubuntu@54.172.154.152:/home/ubuntu/
file.txt                                                                              100%   24    27.2KB/s   00:00
ubuntu@ip-172-31-19-251:~$

 ssh -i "fs-key.pem" ubuntu@ec2-54-172-154-152.compute-1.amazonaws.com
